title: Science Advisory Committee on Health Products Containing Cannabis (SAC-HPCC): Agenda for July 30, 2021 web conference - Canada.ca
content:
## Science Advisory Committee on Health Products Containing Cannabis (SAC-HPCC): Agenda for July 30, 2021 web conference
This web conference will focus on a discussion of the state of the  evidence on safety for health products containing cannabidiol ( CBD ). In advance  of the meeting, members were asked to provide written comments to key  safety-related questions, which will structure and guide the discussions. Although  the discussion will focus on CBD , cannabis and other phytocannabinoids may also  be discussed.
